data.title: AVAX price aims for $15.50-$16.50 mid-Feb, currently at $12.07. Analysts foresee 28-37% potential upside in 2-3 weeks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently priced at $12.07 per unit. Analysts anticipate a potential increase of 28-37%, reaching a range of $15.50-$16.50 in the next 2-3 weeks. Despite showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum signals, the projected upside remains significant.

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) price may recover to $0.45-$0.52 in 4-6 weeks, currently trading at $0.38 support. Upside potential: 18-37%.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently being traded at an oversold price of $0.38, finding support at this level. Analysts predict a potential upside ranging between 18% to 37%, aiming for a price target of $0.45 to $0.52 within the next 4 to 6 weeks, despite the presence of bearish momentum signals in the market.
ECB's Simkus: The current ECB stance fits the current situation very well.
ECB's Simkus: EUR-USD level doesn't imply any policy direction.

data.title: Winmark Corporation declares $0.96 quarterly dividend per share, to be paid on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 11, 2026.
data.description: Minneapolis-based Winmark Corporation (Nasdaq: WINA) has disclosed the approval of a quarterly cash dividend for its shareholders. The dividend amount of $0.96 per share is set to be disbursed on March 2, 2026, to shareholders listed in the records as of the business closure on February 11, 2026. The company, known as Winmark - the Resale Company®, specializes in franchising and is acclaimed nationally for its commitment to sustainability and supporting small businesses. Moving forward, the distribution of dividends will be contingent upon further approval from the Board of Directors.

data.title: AI coding assistants can raise defect risk by 30% in unhealthy code; CodeScene offers AI framework to identify implementation safety.
data.description: A pioneering AI framework developed by CodeScene has been successfully tested at loveholidays, revealing the optimal conditions for implementing AI coding assistants. The research conducted highlights a minimum 30% rise in defect risks associated with the use of AI-coding assistants. This significant finding was disclosed following validation during production in MALMÖ, Sweden on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Small businesses are confident for 2026 with 94% anticipating growth. Owners invest in efficiency and AI use is increasing.
data.description: In Chicago, a recent report indicates that 94% of small businesses are expecting growth within the next year. This positive outlook is attributed to owners investing in efficiency and preparing for changing market dynamics. The study, released on January 28, 2026, highlights the ongoing resilience of small business confidence. The businesses are focusing on strategic planning to navigate evolving conditions, showcasing a promising future for the sector.

data.title: RMX Industries appoints Major General (Ret.) Michael S. Repass to Advisory Board, bringing 30 years of experience.
data.description: Renowned Special Forces Commander with 30 years of elite operational experience and international defense knowledge joins RMX Industries, Inc. in Dallas. This company, traded as RMXI on OTCQB, focuses on developing essential technology for mission-critical purposes. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Yorkville America Equities plans to acquire God Bless America ETF (YALL) for reorganization into Truth Social Funds.
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida, on January 28, 2026, it was reported that Yorkville America Equities, LLC, the sponsor and investment advisor for Truth Social Funds, has finalized a deal to reorganize the God Bless America ETF (with the Ticker: YALL) into the Truth Social Funds. The transition marks a significant move in the investment landscape and signifies a shift in focus.

data.title: FDA halts two Regenxbio gene therapies after patient tumor; stock plummets.
data.description: On Wednesday, the FDA surprisingly halted the progress of two of Regenxbio's gene therapies after a patient was diagnosed with a tumor. This unexpected update significantly impacted Regenxbio stock, causing a downturn in market performance.
